questions.prompt: Put the diagnostic tools in the order an MSP escalates through them.
items: Exclaimer Support ticket with captured diagnostics attached
questions.explanation: Tester first because it's instant and answers most rule failures. Diagnostic Logs second because they confirm what happened on real sends. Message Capture third because it shows the message shape. Support last with the diagnostic attachments.

questions.prompt: Diagnostic Logs retain log data for the past 7 days; older logs are not available.
questions.explanation: Exclaimer retains 7 days of diagnostic-log information. Investigations of older incidents need to rely on documented runbook entries plus the customer's own mail-flow history.
